title: Starting the collection log
body: This is a sample journal entry — it's here so the page renders while the scaffolding gets built. Replace it (or delete it) once there's a real first write-up.

The idea: whenever something happens with the collection — a new plant comes home, a repot, a bloom, a pup pulled off and potted up — it gets a dated entry here with a few photos and a few words. Each paragraph in this list becomes its own paragraph on the page.
Mention a species by its dex slug in the "species" field above and the entry links straight to that Pokedex page — so the journal and the encyclopedia stay woven together.
